projects.name: Loom By Light
projects.description: Arduino Appplication to assist with manual loom production of custom patterns.

learnMore.name: Loom by Light
learnMore.info: Loom by Light was a freelance project comissioned by a textile artist. The Arduino application was designed to run on low spec Arduinos, and allow converting of bitmap images into rows of LED lights for weaving on a manual loom.
